title: Junior Frontend Developer at Flipkart Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Flipkart Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Flipkart Capital India are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Flipkart Capital India:
Flipkart Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
